author: Dr. Ilija Vren
post: For two decades I called repetition an absence of language. I now have to consider the less flattering possibility that repetition was the subject: the sentence that becomes harmless only because a country agrees to repeat it.

author: Mina Plevnik
post: The leaked file is 32-bit, not the 16-bit public master. That proves a different export chain, not authenticity. Stop turning file properties into miracles. The important question is why three separate takedown requests list three different owners.

author: Tomislav Ardan
post: A lyric cannot establish an offence. It can, however, establish that a later allegation did not emerge from nowhere. Courts distinguish proof from context because civilization occasionally remembers grammar.

author: Nika Rime
post: Everyone is asking why she stayed near them. Nobody asks why every road out of the industry led through the same building.

author: Marta Orel
post: We praised her only when she borrowed the orchestra's clothing. That was not respect. It was a customs checkpoint.

author: Dorian Belić
post: The low voice is a dramatic device. Direction remains in dance records all the time. People are hearing a crime because the newspaper told them to.

author: Sven Rasto
post: Track 19 was labelled GUIDE_M. It was muted in the public session before mastering. I am not saying whose voice it was. I am saying the released paperwork claims Track 19 never existed.

author: Sonja Dravac
post: We must allow her peace and avoid a trial by media. Tonight at twenty-one, NARODNA KUĆA devotes a special three-hour edition to the questions the public is already asking.

author: Rade Vran
post: She asked that the rear corridor remain unlocked. It was locked. I was told the order came from protocol. Protocol is a person when it wants something and a building when you ask its name.

author: Anonymous clinic worker
post: The file was opened seven times before she arrived and twice after she left. None of those users worked in her ward.

author: RP Moderation
post: This comment thread has been limited to verified residents due to coordinated speculation. Quoted song lyrics may be removed when presented as medical or legal fact.

author: User 4419
post: It is a club song. You people discovered metaphors because the bass stopped long enough for you to hear yourselves.

author: User GOST
post: Maybe it is only a club song. I still knew what she meant before I knew what happened.

author: Varda Cultural Foundation
post: The Foundation categorically rejects the conversion of decades of public cultural partnership into a retrospective narrative of coercion.
